title: Lead SEO Specialist at Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates:
Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates!
